en: The graveyard is full of indispensable men.
zh: 坟场里躺满了自以为不可或缺的人。
author: Charles de Gaulle

en: No one on their deathbed has ever said 'I wish I had spent more time at the office.'
zh: 从来没有人在临终时说过'我希望我在办公室多待了几个小时'。
author: Paul Tsongas

en: Beware the barrenness of a busy life.
zh: 警惕忙碌生活的贫瘠。
author: Socrates

en: The man who thinks he can and the man who thinks he can't are both right. But the man who sleeps gets to try again tomorrow.
zh: 觉得自己行的人和觉得自己不行的人都是对的。但睡觉的人明天还能再试一次。

en: Fatigue makes cowards of us all.
zh: 疲惫使我们所有人都变成懦夫。
author: Vince Lombardi

en: Sleep is the best meditation.
zh: 睡眠是最好的冥想。
author: Dalai Lama

en: Your future depends on your dreams, so go to sleep.
zh: 你的未来取决于你的梦，所以赶紧去睡。
author: Mesut Barazany

en: The work will still be there tomorrow. You might not be.
zh: 工作明天还在。你不一定。

en: Six hours of sleep and a clear head will do more than twelve hours and a foggy brain.
zh: 清醒的六小时，比迷糊的十二小时能做的多得多。

en: It is not enough to be busy. So are the ants.
zh: 忙碌是不够的，蚂蚁也很忙。
author: Henry David Thoreau

en: Man sacrifices his health to make money. Then he sacrifices money to recuperate his health.
zh: 人先牺牲健康去换钱，再牺牲钱来恢复健康。
author: Dalai Lama

en: Lack of sleep is the new smoking.
zh: 缺觉是新时代的吸烟。
author: Matthew Walker

en: You are not paid to be a martyr. Go to bed.
zh: 没人付你殉道的钱。去睡觉。

en: The best bridge between despair and hope is a good night's sleep.
zh: 连接绝望与希望的最好的桥，是好好睡一觉。
author: E. Joseph Cossman

en: Burning the midnight oil is just burning yourself.
zh: 熬的不是夜，是你自己。

en: One good night's sleep is worth more than a thousand hours of anxious work.
zh: 好好睡一晚，比焦虑地干一千个小时更值。

en: The world will not end if you stop now.
zh: 你现在停下来，世界不会毁灭。

en: Think in the morning. Act in the noon. Eat in the evening. Sleep in the night.
zh: 晨思，午行，暮食，夜眠。
author: William Blake

en: Finish each day and be done with it. Tomorrow is a new day.
zh: 过完今天就算了。明天是新的一天。
author: Ralph Waldo Emerson

en: The night is not a badge of honor. It's a warning sign.
zh: 熬夜不是勋章，是警报。

en: Give me six hours to chop down a tree and I will spend the first four sharpening the axe.
zh: 给我六小时砍一棵树，我会花前四个小时磨斧头。
author: Abraham Lincoln

en: It is not that we have a short time to live, but that we waste a great deal of it.
zh: 不是人生太短，而是我们浪费了太多。
author: Seneca

en: Never mistake motion for action.
zh: 永远不要把动作当成行动。
author: Ernest Hemingway

en: The essence of strategy is choosing what not to do.
zh: 战略的本质是选择不做什么。
author: Michael Porter

en: If you don't have time to think, you don't have time to succeed.
zh: 如果你没时间思考，你就没时间成功。
author: Naval Ravikant

en: Busy is a decision. You are not busy, you just have wrong priorities.
zh: 忙是一种选择。你不是忙，你只是优先级搞错了。
author: Debbie Millman

en: Working hard for something we don't care about is called stress. Knowing what matters is called clarity.
zh: 为不在乎的事拼命叫压力。知道什么重要叫清醒。
author: Simon Sinek

en: The most productive thing you can do when tired is stop.
zh: 疲惫的时候你能做的最高效的事，就是停下来。

en: Efficiency is doing things right. Effectiveness is doing the right things.
zh: 效率是把事情做对。效能是做对的事情。
author: Peter Drucker

en: You can do anything, but not everything.
zh: 你什么都能做，但不是什么都该做。
author: David Allen
